/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vulkano_tests.dir/tests_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkano_tests.dir/timing_tests.cpp.o -o vulkano_tests  ../libvulkano.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Maind.a ../_deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a ../_deps/volk-build/libvolk.a ../_deps/vkbootstrap-build/libvk-bootstrap.a ../libimgui_backend.a ../_deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2d.a
